_comment: Closed-form parametric formulas for each Snail Mail curve factory, recovered by reading the FPU disassembly and verified against Unicorn emulation of the isolated factory (see curve_points.json for sampled control points). i = control-point index, N = point count, t = i/(N-1) unless noted. Every factory writes the centerline POSITION at control-point +0x30/+0x34/+0x38 = (X,Y,Z). Y baseline rail = 0.49 for flat curves; Z advances ~1 unit/point (forward). Lateral motion is in X; vertical loops are in Y; roll/banking is applied at RUNTIME (see descriptor_table.json runtime_shaper_chain).

LOOPTHELOOP.shape: vertical loop-the-loop. Lead-in/out are straight ramps; the middle traces a vertical circle of radius ~= amp in the X-Y plane. Emulated (size=6): X[-2.5,2.5], Y[0,11.76] (rises and inverts), Z 0..13.
LOOPTHELOOP.circle: X += sin(t/2 + 3pi/2)*amp ; Y,Z trace the vertical circle, t = i*2pi/r

LOOPBOW.shape: same as LOOPTHELOOP (idx0), bowed variant. Emulated identical: X[-2.5,2.5] Y[0,11.76].

LOOPTHELOOPW.shape: wide loop. Emulated (size=8): X[-2.3,2.3], Y[0,15.92] (taller), Z dips to -0.94 (overhang). N=64.

LOOPOUT.shape: loop that dips BELOW grade. Emulated: X[-2.3,2.36], Y[-5.73,0], Z 0..13. N=32.

HUMP.shape: raised-cosine bump. The factory's centerline X tapers (cos) and the vertical hump is ALSO added at runtime via the hill-bump gate (idx 16). Emulated lateral X[-3.5,3.5].

DUMP.shape: HUMP negated (fchs): a downward dip. Y(i) = -(1 - cos(2*pi*i/r))*(0.095493*r)*(4*arg). Emulated X[-3.5,3.5].

DIP.shape: gentle dip. Emulated: X=0, Y[-1.91,0], Z 0..21. N=22.

SCREW.shape: tight lateral screw. One full sine cycle. Emulated X[-0.5,0.5], Z 0..23, N=24.
SCREW.formula_X: X(i) = 0.5*cos(2*pi*i/N)   (then runtime roll spins the cross-section: corkscrew)

SLALOM.shape: windowed single sine weave. Emulated X[-3.03,3.03], N=32.
SLALOM.formula_X: X(i) = 5.0 * sin(2*pi*u) * (1 - |2u-1|),  u=i/N   (one cycle, tapered to zero at ends)

SLALOMBIG.shape: wider slalom, amp 40/9=4.444, steeper bank (pi/12). X(i) = (40/9)*sin(2*pi*u)*window. Emulated X[-2.69,2.69].

SLALOMDOUBLE.shape: TWO sine cycles (4pi) over 70 points + gentle longitudinal S, amp 40/9. Emulated X[-3.46,3.46], Y[0,2], Z 0..69.

SWEEP.shape: single sweep. Emulated X[-2,2], Y[-0.3,0], Z 0..29.

SNAKE.shape: snaking weave with vertical wobble. Emulated X[0,2], Y[-2,0], Z 0..26.

WIBBLE.shape: wibble weave. Emulated centerline straight (X applied via runtime roll); Z 0..31.

WORM.shape: STRAIGHT tube. Centerline X=0, Y=0.49, Z = 4*i (i=0..23). The worm wiggle is animation applied at runtime, not baked.

START.shape: start ramp, rises. Emulated X=0, Y[0,7.64] (climbs), Z 0..26. Also gated for runtime hill-bump (idx 36).

SUPERTRAMP.shape: trampoline bounce, rises. Emulated Y[0,2.04], Z 0..11.39.

TURNOVER.shape: vertical arc + lateral S (half-turnover). Emulated X[-2.41,2.41], Y[0,4.70], Z 0..44. Runtime roll 180deg.

TURNOVERDOUBLE.shape: double turnover. Emulated X[-2.83,2.83], Y[0,3.57], Z 0..63.

TURNUNDER.shape: turnover going under. Emulated X[-2,2], Y[-2.35,0], Z 0..44.

CAGE2.shape: cage/barrel. Emulated centerline straight (cross-section + roll at runtime), Z 0..21.

INVERT.shape: full vertical inversion loop. Tangent rotates by ang=i*pi/16 (one full 2pi over 34). Centerline integrates that tangent. Runtime roll 360deg (cork=true). Emulated +0x30 straight at this seg arg; the loop is in the tangent/frame and the runtime roll.
INVERT.formula: ang = i*pi/16 ; Y += 0.49*sin(ang) ; Z += 0.49*cos(ang)  (vertical circle radius ~2.5)

HALFPIPE.shape: STRAIGHT road with a U-shaped cross-section. The +0xa0 PROFILE is the pipe wall radius: starts ~40, narrows to 4.0 at the middle, widens back to ~40 (symmetric). Runtime applies a there-and-back bank (~52deg). Centerline X=0,Y=0,Z=i.

TWISTERA.shape: corkscrew helix, ~1 twist over 34 points. Emulated X = 2.5*cos(phase): -2.5,-2.45,-2.31,-2.08,-1.77,... (clean for interior points). Also gated for runtime hill-bump (idx 43).
TWISTERA.formula: phase = i*pi/16 (+pi if mirror) ; X = 2.5*cos(phase) ; Z = i ; (twist Y from runtime roll)

TWISTER2A.shape: double corkscrew, ~2 twists over 52 points. Emulated X[-2.5,2.48] = 2.5*cos(i*2pi/25). Gated for runtime hill-bump (idx 45).
TWISTER2A.formula: phase = i*2pi/25 (+pi if mirror) ; X = 2.5*cos(phase) ; Z = i

families_for_track_js._comment: Maps each curve to the remaster's family model (segments.js pathFamily). Recovered magnitudes to replace the current guesses.
